## Testing
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Manual verification completed

## Checklist
- [ ] PR title uses a conventional prefix such as `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`, or `test:`
- [ ] Branch name matches the work type, for example `feat/...`, `fix/...`, or `chore/...`
- [ ] Scope is limited to one coherent change
- [ ] Follow-up work, if any, is described below
